assertion_results.text: Model selected is opus (complex multi-file architectural change)
assertion_results.evidence: Step 1 lists opus for 'multi-file refactors, architectural changes'. The prompt says 'Refactor the entire authentication system...across all service boundaries, updating the middleware chain and all downstream consumers' — clearly multi-file and architectural.

assertion_results.text: spawn-tmux.sh is called with --model opus (or equivalent)
assertion_results.evidence: Step 4 code block shows '[--model <model>]' as an optional flag. If opus is selected in step 1, it would be passed here.

assertion_results.text: Branch name reflects the refactor task
assertion_results.evidence: Step 1 says to derive a short descriptive branch name. Something like 'refactor-auth-oauth2' would follow the pattern.
